'''lapaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xray|xray]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-p-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xray|xray]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| lapaka
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:læpækæth|læpækæth]] || [[word:læpækæj|læpækæj]] || [[word:læpækæsh|læpækæsh]] || [[word:læpækæ|læpækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lapapakath|lapapakath]] || [[word:lapapakaj|lapapakaj]] || [[word:lapapakash|lapapakash]] || [[word:lapapaka|lapapaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lapakath|lapakath]] || [[word:lapakaj|lapakaj]] || [[word:lapakash|lapakash]] || [[word:lapaka|lapaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lapafkath|lapafkath]] || [[word:lapafkaj|lapafkaj]] || [[word:lapafkash|lapafkash]] || [[word:lapafkaf|lapafkaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lapakatha|lapakatha]] || [[word:lapakaja|lapakaja]] || [[word:lapakasha|lapakasha]] || [[word:lapakaka|lapakaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lapakath|lapakath]] || [[word:lapakaj|lapakaj]] || [[word:lapakash|lapakash]] || [[word:lapaka|lapaka]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lapakathal|lapakathal]] || [[word:lapakajal|lapakajal]] || [[word:lapakashal|lapakashal]] || [[word:lapakakal|lapakakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lapakathatha|lapakathatha]] || [[word:lapakajaja|lapakajaja]] || [[word:lapakashasha|lapakashasha]] || [[word:lapakaka|lapakaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lapakathan|lapakathan]] || [[word:lapakajan|lapakajan]] || [[word:lapakashan|lapakashan]] || [[word:lapakakan|lapakakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lapakathaoro|lapakathaoro]] || [[word:lapakajaoro|lapakajaoro]] || [[word:lapakashaoro|lapakashaoro]] || [[word:lapakakaoro|lapakakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
